creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Victor,

i analyzed this issue. At first it seems odd, because you are the only one with the problems. There is no fallout on build machines for mod_php72 and i also coud not reproduce the problem.

But i think the issue lies in your non-standard apache configuration:
MPM_WORKER=on: hybrid multi-threaded multi-process web server
MPM_EVENT=off: MPM worker variant with the goal of consuming threads only for connections with active processing

Default config is:
MPM_WORKER=off
MPM_EVENT=on

I think this compiles apache as threaded. And therefore this warning needs attention:

!!! If you have a threaded Apache, you must build lang/php72 with ZTS support
to enable thread-safety in extensions !!!

I can confirm this thesis after some tests. If you compile www/apache24 with MPM_WORKER=on you need to compile www/mod_php72 with ZTS=on

So, please change the options and everything is fine! :)

Greetings,
Torsten
